intro: Cephalocarpus recurviglumis, also known as Kava Root, is a plant-based medicinal herb belonging to the family Staphylocarpaceae. The health benefits of Cephalocarpus recurviglumis include its anxiolytic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and muscle relaxation. The bioactive constituents of this plant include kavalactones, such as kawain, yangonin, and desmethoxyyangonin, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Cephalocarpus recurviglumis include standardized extracts, capsules, and teas, which are often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and alleviate anxiety symptoms.
